title: Yermy (Yeremy)
html:
Yermy

Yahir's younger brother. Recurring across the 2019–2022 corpus under variant spellings Yermy, Yermers, Yeremy. Promoted from queued-Potential-Entity (slice 3) to real entity at 9+ surfaced mentions — the family-translator notes had been treating him as named but he hadn't had a page until this slice.

Chronological surfacings

  • Oct 16, 2019 (2019 10 16 shits fucked) — "I left Yermers alone at house" when Mom grabs her stuff and leaves; Yahir goes with Mom. The earliest dated household-rupture event-log naming the brothers' split-decision moment.
  • Nov 13, 2019 (2019 11 13 coding zeal) — surfaces in the same coding-pep-talk note Yahir writes himself.
  • June 13, 2020 (2020 06 13 dream shooter prep) — appears in dream-app prep notes.
  • Oct 2, 2020 (2020 10 02 theatre yermy college app todos) — explicit "Yermy" in title; college-app-help-Yermy thread.
  • Dec 31, 2020 (2020 12 31 jan 15 college app) — January college-app deadline tracker, Yermy named.
  • Dec 14, 2021 (2021 12 14 mom dad christmas gift ideas) — gift-list inclusion as immediate-family member.
  • June 4, 2022 (2022 06 04 habits self eval / 2022 06 04 one time things habits) — "playing stuff with yermy" in habits self-audit; brother-as-companion mode.

What this means for the graph

Yermy is the silent counterpart to Yahir's protagonist-frame across the teen era. Where Yahir narrates himself as the family-translator and outward-facing one, Yermy is the stayed-behind / parallel-track sibling — most starkly visible in "I left Yermers alone at house" on Oct 16 2019. The two-brothers split-decision in that note is a latent inflection point in the family arc that runs through Christmas Eve 2022.

By 2020 Yahir is mentoring Yermy through college apps (2020 10 02 theatre yermy college app todos, 2020 12 31 jan 15 college app) — the relationship reverses from "left alone at house" to "helping with apps" over the 12-month rebuild.
